name: Honeymoon Sourdoughs
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients thoroughly in a bowl.
2. Turn the mixture out onto a floured surface and knead lightly.
3. Roll out the dough gently and cut into biscuits.
4. Brush the biscuits lightly with melted butter or margarine.
5. Place on a greased cookie sheet.
6. Bake at 450 degrees Fahrenheit for about 15 minutes.
Makes 9 Large Biscuits.
